ops.text:
Rollout complete 2026-07-19/20. Nine sites live on the unified template, all Documentation builds green, all homepages probe clean (fleet-theme ≥1, nav-footer ≥1, column-margin 0, gd-hero-logo 0). Attached: live homepage captures per site + captain-hook's served fleet-theme.css.

**Template (Phase 1, cc-skills):** 10 gd-build runtime patches (version-gated [0.15,0.16), self-retiring) — sidebar removed at generation + compact footer (PyPI/Source/Issues/Changelog/llms.txt/Skills), hero logo off, homepage demo → termshow shortcode (pandoc-attr regression fixed in e4f9acd), doctest Example fencing, type cross-links + modern unions, search ranking boost for narrative pages, fleet CSS (WCAG: light links 2.41:1 → ≥5.1:1), frontmatter fix for upstream's malformed empty-margin template. User reviewed live and approved.

**Native adoption (1b):** freeze: auto, seo.title_template, warn-only quality gates (lint/check-links/seo audit — proofread omitted, runners lack harper-cli), per-repo mascot palettes with arithmetic WCAG verification on all 6 original repos, cc-steer normalized off lilac/starfield, social_cards.image + twitter_site per repo (fleet placement impossible — fragment concatenation is last-wins; 5 repos set social_cards locally).

**Content-only mode (Phase 2):** reference: false + gd-build[content] extra (0.2.0) + docs-build-content-only.yml fragment; validated on a scratch repo via the exact CI command (9564038d).

**Migrations (Phase 3):** cc-squash (59c9cb21), cc-orchestrate (88ae1067), cc-review (f695e55b — 4 Starlight pages ported to docs/guide/*.md, Astro app retired) onboarded content-only with mascot-derived palettes; bespoke landings/docs.yml retired.

**Infra unblocked:** daily guides renders were rejected on any .github/workflows delta (GITHUB_TOKEN can't carry workflows:write) and never retriggered builds — fixed via per-repo write deploy keys (see note 52aaafaf); proven with workflow-delta pushes on 5 repos. Rotation/onboarding script: cc-skills tools/guides-deploy-keys.py (1Password-minted; user runs it — service account is read-only). mintlify-docs repo deleted.

**Deferred:** versioned-docs pilot, narrative cross-referencing, page_status/nav_icons polish, proofread gate, captain-hook RTD retirement (user manual delete pending). Known frictions: brew cc-guides cask lags releases + portingkit cask 404 breaks brew upgrade machine-wide; render recovery = download matching release binary.
